title: Shawn Ryan
extract: Shawn Ryan (born October 11, 1966) is an American screenwriter and television producer. He has created and/or produced a number of television series including The Shield (2002–08), The Unit (2006–09), Lie to Me (2009–11), Timeless (2016–18),  S.W.A.T. (2017–25) and The Night Agent (2023–present).
